name: Supreme Credit Services
description_short: McAllen, TX credit repair firm in business since 2008. Disputes credit report errors, builds business credit, and offers payment plans for clients nationwide.
description_long:
Big Joe Credit Repair has operated out of McAllen, Texas since 2008, making it one of the longer-running independent credit repair consultancies in the Rio Grande Valley. With over 15 years in business, the firm focuses on personalized, phone-based consulting rather than the automated, self-service model common among national credit repair chains. The company holds no publicly verified certifications such as NFCC membership or HUD-approval — it operates as a private for-profit consulting firm, not a nonprofit or government-affiliated agency.

The core service is credit repair: reviewing client credit reports, identifying inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items, and disputing those entries with the credit bureaus on the client's behalf. Beyond traditional credit repair, Big Joe also offers business credit building services — a meaningful differentiator for small business owners and entrepreneurs in the region. Debt management guidance and credit education round out the offering. Pricing is not published; a representative reviews the client's credit report before quoting a cost, and payment plans are available. Consultations are conducted by phone. The company uses soft-pull tools — specifically IDentity IQ and MyScore IQ — to monitor client credit throughout the process without triggering hard inquiries that would affect the client's score.

The company's 4.8-star Google rating across 120 reviews is its most concrete external signal of quality, suggesting a high and consistent level of client satisfaction over time. Operating since 2008 also places them well ahead of many credit repair startups that have come and gone in the same market. They serve clients remotely across the United States, not just the local RGV area, which indicates a functional national consulting model despite being a small regional operation.

The honest limitations here are primarily around transparency and digital access. No pricing is published on the website, no BBB rating or accreditation was found, and no money-back guarantee is advertised. There is no client portal, no mobile app, and no self-service dashboard — everything runs through direct phone communication with a representative. This is a workable model for clients who prefer high-touch, consultative service, but it is a real constraint for anyone who wants upfront cost estimates, digital account management, or contractual guarantees before engaging.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee mentioned on website. Contact provider for details.

pros: In business since 2008 — over 15 years of credit repair experience in the RGV market
Strong Google reputation: 4.8/5 stars across 120 verified reviews
Uses soft-pull credit tools (IDentity IQ, MyScore IQ) so the consultation process does not impact client credit scores
Offers payment plans, making services accessible to clients with limited immediate cash flow
Serves clients nationwide, not limited to the McAllen/South Texas area
Provides business credit building in addition to personal credit repair — useful for entrepreneurs
cons: No pricing published on the website — clients must contact a representative for a quote, making cost comparison difficult
No BBB rating or accreditation verified, limiting third-party credibility signals
No money-back guarantee or service guarantee mentioned anywhere on the site
No online client portal or mobile app — all service delivery is phone-based
No nonprofit status, HUD approval, or NFCC certification — not a free or subsidized option for low-income consumers
best_for: Rio Grande Valley residents seeking an established local credit repair consultant with a long track record
Consumers with damaged credit working toward qualifying for a home loan or auto loan
Small business owners or entrepreneurs in Texas looking to build business credit
Clients who prefer direct, personalized phone-based service over automated self-service platforms
diagnosis: Big Joe Credit Repair is best suited for consumers in the McAllen area — or willing to work remotely — who want a hands-on, consultant-driven credit repair experience from a firm with 15+ years of local history and strong Google reviews. The main caveat is a lack of pricing transparency and no published guarantees, so prospective clients should request a full cost breakdown before committing.
services: Credit report error identification and disputes
Soft-pull credit review using IDentity IQ
Soft-pull credit review using MyScore IQ
Nationwide remote credit consulting by phone
Credit qualification guidance for home, auto, and business loans
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
